final:
module RefModule(
    input               clk     , 
    input               rst     ,
    input               en      ,
    input       [15:0]  data_in ,

    output reg  [15:0]  data_out
);

// Register operation
  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (rst) begin
        data_out <= 16'd0;
    end else if (en) begin
        data_out <= data_in;
    end
end

endmodule
